decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id entity_mta-nyct matches the existing registry record entity_mta-nyct (MTA New York City Transit, entity_type: agency). The observation already resolves to this canonical identity — same name, same acronym, same organizational context. No different record is a better match.

Observation base_record_id entity_nyc-dot matches the existing registry record entity_nyc-dot (New York City Department of Transportation, entity_type: agency). The observation already resolves to this canonical identity — same name, same acronym NYC DOT. No different record is a better match.

Observation base_record_id entity_manhattan-community-board-6 matches the existing registry record entity_manhattan-community-board-6 (Manhattan Community Board 6, entity_type: community_board). This source (2011_brt_34th_cb6_slides) is already listed among the record's source_ids. The observation already resolves to this canonical identity.

Observation base_record_id entity_eagle-team-2010 matches the existing registry record entity_eagle-team-2010 (Eagle Team, entity_type: program). The registry card already lists this observation's submission_id (sub_6dce3a10f46a3936), local_observation_id (entity_nyct_eagle_team_2011), and source (2011_brt_34th_cb6_slides). The observation is already merged into this canonical identity.
